areas.name: Membership Core
areas.description: New MemberRoleInfo and MemberRoleMemberInfo data classes, authentication refactoring to ClaimsPrincipal, and MembershipContext updates

files.summary: Refactored to use ClaimsPrincipal instead of legacy RequestContext for authentication checks
New extension methods for ClaimsPrincipal to extract admin identity by authentication scheme
New data class representing a member role with ID, GUID, name, display name, and description properties
New binding table class for many-to-many relationship between members and member roles
AuthenticatedUser property now uses ClaimsPrincipal; IsAdministrationUser changed to accept ClaimsPrincipal

areas.name: Content Item Member Role System
areas.description: New ContentAccessSettings model, ContentItemMemberRole binding infrastructure, and role management/retrieval services

files.summary: New immutable model for content access control with IsSecured flag and RequiredMemberRoleIDs collection; replaces bool IsSecured throughout
New data class for content item-to-member-role binding with CI serialization support
Manages CRUD operations for content item-role bindings; syncs role assignments via bulk insert/delete
Retrieves member role data for content items with 60-minute progressive caching and cache dependency management
Public interface for managing content item member role bindings
Public interface for querying member role information for content items with multiple retrieval methods
Event handlers ensuring content items are stored in CI when role bindings change via insert/update/delete events

areas.name: MVC Content Security and Access Control
areas.description: New content access validation pipeline distinguishing 401 (NotAuthenticated) from 403 (Forbidden); HasAccess() extension for content items; web page routing refactored for role-based access

files.summary: New enum with Allowed, NotAuthenticated, and Forbidden values for content access checks
Post-configures cookie auth to handle 401/403 splitting with backward-compatible LoginPath fallback from AccessDeniedPath
New public extension method HasAccess() on IContentItemFieldsSource for checking member role-based access
Core access validation logic: CheckAccess, IsUserAuthenticated, UserIsInAnyRole static methods
Validates user access to content items and assets using role-based checks against member role requirements
Added NotAuthorized() action returning Challenge() for HTTP 401 unauthorized responses
New internal interface for checking content access with CheckAccess and CheckAssetAccess methods
Set method signature changed from void to async Task with CancellationToken

Updated to pass through the async Set method signature change

areas.name: Authentication and Identity Pipeline

files.summary: New service implementing IAdminSchemeAuthenticationService with AuthenticateAndReplace and AuthenticateAndAdd methods
Removed registration of DefaultAdminAuthenticationPolicy
Deleted: old authorization policy replaced by middleware-based authentication approach

New static utility detecting preview or crawler mode from request context
Updated to use new VirtualContextIdentityService for adding identity to context
Added GetUserId and GetUserName overrides extracting admin claims from ClaimsPrincipal
Unit tests updated or added for member role / ContentAccessSettings changes
New middleware adding admin identity to existing user principal in live-site pipeline for preview mode
Updated middleware pipeline registration for new authentication middleware chain

Deleted: no longer needed after moving from policy-based to middleware-based auth
New public interface with AuthenticateAndReplace and AuthenticateAndAdd methods
No-op implementation for deployments without administration module
Registers NoOpAdminSchemeAuthenticationService as default; registers ContentAccessCookieAuthenticationConfiguration
